{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Urg'naut's tomb
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Contact has been lost with units around [[Urg'naut's tomb]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We’ve lost contact with our units around Urg’naut’s tomb,” Darius went on.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
